title: neomammillaria subdurispina
intro: Neomammillaria subdurispina, also known as the "clustered mammillaria", is a small cactus species native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria subdurispina include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to be used topically for its medicinal properties.
